query_texts:
ALTER INDEX ALL ON [dbo].[pagecomp_anchor] REBUILD
    WITH (DATA_COMPRESSION = PAGE)

INSERT INTO [dbo].[pagecomp_anchor] (id, editor, ts, ts2, amount, qty, label, geo)
SELECT TOP (5000)
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL))            AS id,
    1                                              AS editor,
    CAST('2021-06-15T12:00:00.0000000'  AS DATETIME2(7))                         AS ts,
    CAST('2021-12-31T23:59:59.0000000' AS DATETIME2(7))                         AS ts2,
    CAST(12.500 AS DECIMAL(18,3))                       AS amount,
    CAST(7 AS BIGINT)                                 AS qty,
    'COMMON_PREFIX_LABEL'                                             AS label,
    geography::Point(47.6062, -122.3321, 4326)          AS geo
FROM sys.all_objects a CROSS JOIN sys.all_objects b
